name: Oriental Chicken, Peppers, and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 3 chicken breast halves to yield about 4 servings. For larger portions, use more chicken.
2. Skin, debone, and chop the chicken into cubes.
3. Mince the garlic cloves.
4. Wash, seed, and julienne the red and green peppers.
5. Do not drain the pineapple.
6. Heat a heavy skillet; add 1 tablespoon oil. Saute the peppers, garlic, and onion until the onion is limp. Remove from skillet and keep warm.
7. Add 1 tablespoon oil to skillet and cook chicken cubes until all turn white and are cooked through. This step should not take long – avoid overcooking.
8. Mix cornstarch with soy sauce and some of the pineapple juice in a small bowl.
9. Combine the chicken with the onion mixture. Add the pineapple chunks and juice, along with brown sugar, vinegar, and ground or freshly grated ginger. Heat to boiling, then add the cornstarch mixture. Stir constantly until the sauce is thickened and heated through.
10. Serve immediately over hot cooked white rice.
